## Summary

Describe what this pull request changes.

## Type

- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] Feature
- [ ] Performance / optimization
- [ ] Localization
- [ ] Documentation
- [ ] Refactor

## Checklist

- [ ] I have read `CONTRIBUTING.md`.
- [ ] I understand this project uses the LiveTranscriber Source Available
      License 1.0.
- [ ] I preserved the commercial attribution requirements in `LICENSE` and
      `NOTICE`.
- [ ] User-facing strings use the `L10n.*` typed localization pattern, such as
      `L10n.Settings.recordingFormat`.
- [ ] I updated documentation when behavior changed.
- [ ] I tested the affected flow or explained why testing was not possible.

## Testing

List the commands or manual checks you ran.

## Screenshots

Add screenshots or screen recordings for visible UI changes.
